---
title: "2015"
subtitle: "7,707 posts this year. Showing first 300."
anchor-sections: false
---

<script src="https://cdn.plot.ly/plotly-2.35.2.min.js"></script>

<div id="year-months" class="volume-chart"></div>
<script>
  (function () {
    var d = [{ x: ["01", "02", "03", "04", "05", "06", "07", "08", "09", "10", "11", "12"], y: [1145, 506, 446, 778, 717, 528, 792, 364, 427, 795, 587, 622],
                type: "bar", marker: { color: "#0A2540" } }];
    var l = {
      margin: { t: 10, r: 10, b: 30, l: 40 },
      paper_bgcolor: "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
      plot_bgcolor: "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
      height: 210, showlegend: false
    };
    Plotly.newPlot("year-months", d, l, {displayModeBar: false, responsive: true});
  })();
</script>

```{=html}

Jan 02, 2015  15:35</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ dungyots: . @ realDonaldTrump with a solid cameo in # HomeAlone2 https://twitter.com/dungyots/status/551121039171010560/photo/1pic.twitter.com/UV1XwDd7wF &#x27; Thanks</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551129657828188160" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551129657828188160" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 02, 2015  15:36</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ Madrina26: @ realDonaldTrump So excited for Sunday and Celebrity Apprentice!!!&#x27; You will love it</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551129945985257476" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551129945985257476" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 02, 2015  15:36</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ KdanielsK: @ misstcassidy @ AllAboutTheTea_ @ realDonaldTrump My money is on Kenya getting fired first.&#x27;&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551130005905084416" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551130005905084416" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 02, 2015  15:39</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ UniqueCaptures: DonaldTrump: Even though I feel his personality is to strong for President</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551130641648328704" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551130641648328704" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 02, 2015  15:39</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ Photocritic: Oh please please please let @ realDonaldTrump run for president. That would make my year.&#x27;&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551130778068074496" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551130778068074496" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 02, 2015  15:40</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ misstcassidy: @ KdanielsK @ realDonaldTrump @ AllAboutTheTea_ I just hope both last well half way into season w/lots of drama!&#x27;&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551131032280649729" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551131032280649729" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 02, 2015  15:42</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ barrman: @ realDonaldTrump so excited to watch celebrity apprentice on Sunday night! Can&#x27;t wait&#x27;&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551131492425154560" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551131492425154560" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 02, 2015  15:43</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ FrisbieKaren: @ realDonaldTrump # CelebrityApprentice my secret addiction! Jan 02, 2015  15:47</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27;@StevenCena35: @ realDonaldTrump look awesome in Home Alone 2 lost New York you look great in the movie today in @ ABCFamily&#x27;&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551132665324535808" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551132665324535808" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 02, 2015  15:47</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ RustyHook2: @ realDonaldTrump @ trillacamila You would be a damn sight better than Jeb ! or &#x27;Billary&#x27; !&#x27;&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551132779044687872" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551132779044687872" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 02, 2015  15:48</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ brian_muldoon: @ realDonaldTrump Headed to Trump Central Park for my wife&#x27;s birthday!! Can&#x27;t wait!!&#x27; Have fun!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551132862033178625" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551132862033178625" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 02, 2015  15:48</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ The_Edward_K: @ realDonaldTrump Your a Genius sir # TrumpForPresident&#x27;&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551132895700860929" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551132895700860929" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 02, 2015  15:48</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ MorrisFrance: Excited for the Miss Universe! Hi @ realDonaldTrump &#x27;&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551132927715995649" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551132927715995649" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 02, 2015  15:49</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ diannelea1958: @MFonnest @ realDonaldTrump @ ApprenticeNBC @ ChannelGuide Hell yes! It&#x27;s gonna be fun.&#x27;&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551133110566666241" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551133110566666241" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 02, 2015  15:49</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ FREDOSANTANASS: @ realDonaldTrump is a great leader and definitely someone I look up to. Great role model&#x27; Thanks.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551133282818359296" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551133282818359296" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 02, 2015  15:57</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ bbolaji9: Happy new year my president @ realdonaldtrump&#x27; Thank you.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551135177175732224" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551135177175732224" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 02, 2015  15:57</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ midniteracers: @ realDonaldTrump Gets my vote for President. He&#x27;s my hero! When I grow up I want to be like him.&#x27;&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551135269664358400" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551135269664358400" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 02, 2015  15:58</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ nick_nlawrie: @ realDonaldTrump if you&#x27;re as strident in life as you are with these tweets then no wonder you&#x27;re loaded.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551135471116746752" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551135471116746752" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 02, 2015  15:58</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27;@ArrestJOEPA: @ realDonaldTrump and @ terrellowens sounds like a dream team&#x27;&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551135516062912512" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551135516062912512" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 02, 2015  15:59</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ RunningDeep67: @ UniqueCaptures Too strong? Point out a time in America&#x27;s history where it was good to have a PUSSY in the White House!&#x27;&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551135827259314176" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551135827259314176" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 02, 2015  17:22</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;. @ ApprenticeNBC season premiere this Sunday at 9/8c on @ NBC- http://youtu.be/Gv1yV6V0XUI&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551156496877506560" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551156496877506560" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 02, 2015  21:06</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ Bettylovesdogs: @ realDonaldTrump I work Sunday evenings will celebrity apprentice be replayed? Watch tomorrow night at 9:00 then Mon. at 8&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551213005829320705" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551213005829320705" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 02, 2015  21:11</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ seankesser: @ realDonaldTrump It&#x27;s a well known fact now that Donald Trump totally defeated Eric Schneiderman&#x27;&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6B3F72">Elections &amp; Voting</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551214313130983424" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551214313130983424" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 02, 2015  21:12</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ seankesser: @ realDonaldTrump: Trump University was exceptionally highly rated. Jan 02, 2015  21:43</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ rexhispaniae: @ realDonaldTrump will be watching with my entire family. Jan 03, 2015  14:20</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;My @ nbcdfw int. by @EricKingNBC5 w/ @ IvankaTrump discussing the Sunday @ nbc premiere of @ ApprenticeNBC‚Äôs 14th seasonhttp://www.nbcdfw.com/video/#!/on-air/as-seen-on/Donald--Ivanka-Trump-Discuss-Celebrity-Apprentice/287123951 ‚Ä¶&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551473070217916416" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551473070217916416" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B6B6B" data-theme="general" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 03, 2015  15:30</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;By popular demand I will be tweeting during tomorrow&#x27;s record 14th season premiere of @ ApprenticeNBC on @ nbc at 9/8chttp://www.nbc.com/the-celebrity-apprentice ‚Ä¶&quot;</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551490935125970944" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551490935125970944" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5E7A4C" data-theme="lifestyle" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 03, 2015  16:53</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Via @ HorsetalkNZ: ‚ÄúFlorida‚Äôs Trump Invitational to kick off showjumping year‚Äù http://horsetalk.co.nz/2015/01/01/florida-trump-invitational-starts-showjumping-year/#ixzz3Nn4nJGET ‚Ä¶ Mar-a-Lago&#x27;s 3rd ann. Trump Grand Prix!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551511709014577153" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551511709014577153" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5E7A4C" data-theme="lifestyle" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 03, 2015  17:31</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Via @ ShinySheet by @ soapbox1: ‚ÄúShow-jumping grand prix returns to Mar-a-Lago Sunday&#x27;http://www.palmbeachdailynews.com/news/news/local/horse-jumping-grand-prix-returns-to-mar-a-lago-sun/njd6J/#sthash.EVgY8PMF.dpuf ‚Ä¶&quot;</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551521158420758530" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551521158420758530" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 03, 2015  17:51</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ TheShowOff85: Too excited to seeing my two favourite people on TV together on one show</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551526309198069760" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551526309198069760" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 03, 2015  17:52</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ LeezaGibbons: ‚Äú @ emilyplacido: @ LeezaGibbons @ IvankaTrump I&#x27;m so rooting for you on Celebrity Apprentice @ LeezaGibbons!! Go girl!TYSM&#x27;&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551526499099361283" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551526499099361283" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B6B6B" data-theme="general" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 03, 2015  17:52</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ LeezaGibbons: ‚Äú@KellyMcKayShow: @ LeezaGibbons @ IvankaTrump @ realDonaldTrump already set the DVR for Sunday and Monday. # TVgeek‚Äù&quot;</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551526665252511746" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551526665252511746" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 03, 2015  17:56</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ wouldnotmind: @ ApprenticeNBC @ ivankatrump @ realDonaldTrump : I know and we are ready .. who is going to win ? My GIRL @ KenyaMoore&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551527516457152513" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551527516457152513" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B6B6B" data-theme="general" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 03, 2015  21:50</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ patjeanes: @ realDonaldTrump Im sure the show will be great</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Jan 03, 2015  21:50</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ ShellsterNYC: @ realDonaldTrump @ ApprenticeNBC How many times does TO cry?&#x27;&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Jan 03, 2015  21:51</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27;@PamKing8628: @ realDonaldTrump @ mikerandcom - # TeamLeeza will be following ur # CelebApprentice comments! @ LeezaGibbons&#x27;&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551586604448755712" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551586604448755712" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B6B6B" data-theme="general" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 03, 2015  21:51</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ ___LisaMichelle: So excited. You got this Brandi! @ BrandiGlanville @ ApprenticeNBC @ realDonaldTrump&#x27;&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551586812700160000" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551586812700160000" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 03, 2015  21:55</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ wristbridge: Just set my DVR for The Apprentice. Let&#x27;s go @ realDonaldTrump&#x27;&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551587594862362625" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551587594862362625" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 03, 2015  21:55</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ MattLytle: @ realDonaldTrump So a new Celebrity Apprentice Sunday and Monday night?&#x27; YES.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551587632699146240" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551587632699146240" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 03, 2015  21:55</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ hobbyath: @ realDonaldTrump @ ApprenticeNBC Brandi G. # getoffmyTV goes first hopefully&#x27;&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551587795622707200" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551587795622707200" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 03, 2015  21:56</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ RosaleeAdams: @ realDonaldTrump @ ApprenticeNBC I thought it would never start again...&#x27;&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551587831895048193" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551587831895048193" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 03, 2015  21:56</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27;@shihtzupad: @ realDonaldTrump @ ApprenticeNBC I LOVE THIS SHOW&#x27;&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551587884718096385" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551587884718096385" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 03, 2015  21:56</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ JSKibler: @ MrDrewScott @ MrSilverScott we need to get you all on the @ celebapprentice with the @ realDonaldTrump. # unstoppable # makeithappen&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551587895359045633" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551587895359045633" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B6B6B" data-theme="general" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  09:33</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27;@tbc_branding: To my biz-minded tweeps from # SharkTankNation # Restaurantstartup # theprofit...I&#x27;ll see you 2nite for # CelebrityApprentice&quot;</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551763394932801536" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551763394932801536" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  09:34</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ DavidThomasNo1: Tune in for some late night viewing of @ realDonaldTrump on celebrity apprentice USA @ BBCOne tonight&#x27;&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551763650634350592" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551763650634350592" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  09:37</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ emilyplacido: @ realDonaldTrump @ BernieSandner @ ApprenticeNBC Me too!!!! # TeamLeeza all the way!!! @ LeezasCareCafe is a wonderful charity!!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551764464794869760" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551764464794869760" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  09:38</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ DavidBodner: So excited for # thecelebrityapprentice cant wait to see what @ realDonaldTrump @ IvankaTrump have in store for us this season!&#x27;&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551764724254507008" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551764724254507008" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  09:40</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ JanzenErika: @ BillRancic @ ApprenticeNBC Thank you for reminding me watch/ set my pvr for The Apprentice tonight! Thank you Bill.&#x27;&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #4A5C3A">Military &amp; Veterans</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551764998671044609" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551764998671044609" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  09:40</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ JillyBaDilly: @ realDonaldTrump I&#x27;ve been waiting for this day for way too long! # CelebApprentice starts tonight! Can&#x27;t wait! &#x27; Enjoy!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551765193534242816" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551765193534242816" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  09:41</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ mariadomenique9: @ ApprenticeNBC @ TODAYshow @ realDonaldTrump @ RealGilbert @ GeraldoRivera cant wait to watch tonight!!!&#x27;&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551765296848318464" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551765296848318464" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  09:41</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ ChrisJPMac: Really looking forward to the Premier of The Apprentice tonight at 9PM EST on NBC.Such a well executed and captivating show.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551765453258125312" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551765453258125312" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  09:43</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ Heidilucky: Hello Mr. Trump. I LOVE @ TheApprentice9 and can NOT wait till it airs. @ ABCSharkTank and @ TheProfitCNBC ; 2 other faves!&#x27;&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551765847107452928" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551765847107452928" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  09:43</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ cinna33: @ MrSilverScott @ CelebApprentice @ realDonaldTrump @ JSKibler Yeah! Bring on/down the gauntlet&#x27;&quot;</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551765926409150464" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551765926409150464" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  09:44</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ NicoleAMarin: I can&#x27;t wait to watch this season of # CelebrityApprentice @ DonaldJTrumpJr I can&#x27;t wait to watch @ BrandiGlanville dominate!&#x27;&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551766227493093377" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551766227493093377" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  09:45</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ KellyJeanturner: @ realDonaldTrump @ Kateplusmy8 # ticktock 12 hours &amp; counting down to watch # ApprenticeNBC&#x27;&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551766358858682369" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551766358858682369" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  09:46</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ PamelaDunfee: @ BillRancic @ realDonaldTrump @ ApprenticeNBC I can&#x27;t wait to watch The New APPRENTICE NBC @9:00 pm tonight.&#x27;&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551766727982612481" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551766727982612481" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  09:51</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Everyone is asking me to cover The Apprentice LIVE on twitter. I will do so. Tonight 9 to 11. IT WILL BE A GREAT EVENING OF TELEVISION!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551767846364413953" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551767846364413953" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  16:02</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;# CelebApprentice @ apprenticenbc returns tonight at 9/8c on NBC- http://instagram.com/p/xcpEVkGhUI/?modal=true ‚Ä¶&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551861327204196352" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551861327204196352" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  19:52</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;This is going to be a special season - truly great characters and cast. You will soon see!&quot;</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551919091507027970" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551919091507027970" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  19:53</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ fabiolasellsnj: @ DonaldJTrumpJr @ realDonaldTrump @ ApprenticeNBC looking forward to this&#x27;&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551919351469969408" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551919351469969408" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  19:53</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ Flowerchic462: Ok Tweeps. Who is going home first tonight?! # CelebApprentice @ ApprenticeNBC @ realDonaldTrump @ DonaldJTrumpJr @ IvankaTrump&#x27;&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551919422953492481" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551919422953492481" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  19:54</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ SkaCreek: In Ten minutes on @ realDonaldTrump &#x27;s Apprentice @ IanZiering begins his season long domination! @ Jason_Priestley you watchin?&#x27;&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551919614381527042" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551919614381527042" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  19:56</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;It&#x27;s still exciting after all these years - and this cast is special!&quot;</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551920264280571906" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551920264280571906" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B6B6B" data-theme="general" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  19:59</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;So</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551920900669734913" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551920900669734913" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  20:01</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27;@llluminatedOnes: Here we go! @ ApprenticeNBC starts NOW on @ NBC! Let&#x27;s do this! @ RealDonaldTrump @ IvankaTrump # CelebApprentice&#x27;&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551921491517124609" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551921491517124609" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  20:04</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ princessrisssss: I am SOO super excited to watch @ ShawnJohnson and DonaldTrump on tonight!! Two of my favorite people ever. SHE IS GREAT.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551922154816950273" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551922154816950273" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  20:05</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ fabulyss22: My Sunday&#x27;s will now be spent with @ realDonaldTrump again! So excited # CelebrityApprentice is back!&#x27;&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; This should be interesting.&#x27; True.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551923645921366017" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551923645921366017" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Lifestyle</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551923743384416256" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551923743384416256" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  20:11</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ teerexbc: I&#x27;m rooting for @ MsVivicaFox @ ShawnJohnson and @ peachespulliam # CelebrityApprentice # thecelebrityapprentice # nbc DonaldTrump&quot;</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551924017029206016" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551924017029206016" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B6B6B" data-theme="general" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  20:12</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ JakeKrippner: ‚Äú @ realDonaldTrump: So</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551924152580726784" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551924152580726784" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  20:12</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ TNelly813: Yay! @ realDonaldTrump I&#x27;m so excited for celebrity apprentice :)&#x27;&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551924254124806144" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551924254124806144" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  20:13</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27;@KristaCantwell: @ realDonaldTrump I&#x27;m so happy that @ ApprenticeNBC is back! # CelebApprentice&#x27;&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551924322395492354" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551924322395492354" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  20:13</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ MichaelMPierce: Watching @ ApprenticeNBC for the first time ever. Love it so far! @ realDonaldTrump&#x27;&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551924379031203840" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551924379031203840" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  20:14</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ Dbarbs1: @ realDonaldTrump please fire Kenya first.&#x27; Really?&quot;</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551924646669721600" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551924646669721600" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  20:15</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27;@Stevie_SKenergy: @ realDonaldTrump @ NBCApprentice This show motivates me. Part of my inspiration to # saveSKsocial&#x27;&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551924888148377600" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551924888148377600" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  20:15</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ JustSoldCom: @ realDonaldTrump SO HAPPY # CelebrityApprentice is back on! Thanks Donald for keeping it real!&#x27;&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551924963859759104" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551924963859759104" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B6B6B" data-theme="general" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  20:49</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Who do you like - hate so far?&quot;</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551933482386354176" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551933482386354176" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  20:50</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27;@SarahLynEllis: I&#x27;m loving this Celebrity Apprentice season!@realDonaldTrump @ ShawnJohnson @ IvankaTrump The Donald is the best! # YoureFired&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551933754231779328" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551933754231779328" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  20:51</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ mumlvs2run: @ Kateplusmy8 You look fab! They were so lucky to have you in the kitchen @ realDonaldTrump @ ApprenticeNBC Go Kate Go!&#x27;&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551933887459655681" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551933887459655681" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  20:51</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ JoSportsGal: @ BrandiGlanville Too early first episode. @ realDonaldTrump season needs to play out. Then I&#x27;ll let u know. # WorkHard</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551934092397514752" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551934092397514752" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  20:52</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ GlendaKParks: @ realDonaldTrump @ BrandiGlanville NOT @ KenyaMoore! She does nothing but run her mouth!&#x27;&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Jan 04, 2015  20:53</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ mariadomenique9: The mens team has better flavors of pies. Interested to see who wins! # CelebApprentice @ realDonaldTrump&#x27;&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551934416290074625" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551934416290074625" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  20:53</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27;@brendalynwraps: @ realDonaldTrump Leeza!!!&#x27;&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551934478487388161" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551934478487388161" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  20:53</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ CarrieOn2014: @ realDonaldTrump @ BrandiGlanville Brandi is the BEST!!!!! She deserves it all! # CelebrityApprentice&#x27;&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551934526071767040" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551934526071767040" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B6B6B" data-theme="general" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  20:55</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ TGambinoVent: # CelebrityApprentice @ KenyaMoore go home please! @ realDonaldTrump plez help! Love the show but</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551934952674443265" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551934952674443265" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  20:55</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ KristyHernandez: @ realDonaldTrump yay watching my very favorite show</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551935021981106176" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551935021981106176" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  20:56</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ briankgarver: @ realDonaldTrump like Shawn Johnson and predicting her as season winner!!!!!! &#x27;&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6B3F72">Elections &amp; Voting</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551935155188023296" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551935155188023296" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  20:56</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ NaomiEpstein: @ realDonaldTrump @ ApprenticeNBC Kenya Moore will be omarosa redux. That attitude is boring. She needs to go.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551935257591951360" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551935257591951360" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B6B6B" data-theme="general" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  20:57</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ OrionTrunk: @ terrellowens is going to go far because he&#x27;s a media circus. @ IanZiering will come close to winning</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551935373300203521" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551935373300203521" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  20:58</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ ACTUALLYDOMINIC: @ kevinjonas is on # celebapprentice??? that&#x27;s it</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551935855880069121" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551935855880069121" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  21:00</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27;@remember91808: @ RealGilbert and @ kevinjonas are the best things about this season of @ ApprenticeNBC: Can we keep them around until the end&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #4A5C3A">Military &amp;
