Campaign</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551936342985547776" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551936342985547776" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  21:01</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ thatsoundstasty: The baby in the background got hit in the face with flying pie! # poorthing # DidYouSeeThat # CelebApprentice&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551936466193252352" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551936466193252352" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  21:01</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ otowned: @ realDonaldTrump Any Real Housewife&#x27;&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551936510875148288" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551936510875148288" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  21:01</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ KimberlySyring: @ realDonaldTrump @ BrandiGlanville I love Brandi you go girl kick some a$$!!!&#x27;&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Jan 04, 2015  21:02</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ amiguiza: @ realDonaldTrump I believe in Kevin Jonas!!! he&#x27;s the best # TeamKevin # AskKevin&#x27;&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551936688990457857" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551936688990457857" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  21:02</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ ohbehave71: @ realDonaldTrump Kenya Moore - hmmmm - Won&#x27;t be there long. Needs to go. # CelebApprentice&#x27;&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #4B6A88">COVID / Health</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551936722314219520" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551936722314219520" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5E7A4C" data-theme="lifestyle" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  21:05</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ roswell2001: So glad # CelebrityApprentice is back! @ realDonaldTrump @ kevinjonas @ RealGilbert are my favs. Go team vortex!&#x27;&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551937485627215872" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551937485627215872" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  21:06</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ Prochekhomeinsp: Would be the greatest start to the new Year that I could ever imagine!!! Happy New Year Mr. Trump and Team!!!&#x27;&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551937645744754688" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551937645744754688" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  21:06</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27;@ShortCakesSheep: @ realDonaldTrump @ roswell2001 @ kevinjonas @ RealGilbert agree!!!&#x27;&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551937733145690112" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551937733145690112" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5E7A4C" data-theme="lifestyle" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  21:11</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;This boardroom gets CRAZY! These people are wild&quot;</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551939129500770304" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551939129500770304" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  21:18</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ thecccowanshow: @ realDonaldTrump @ NaomiEpstein @ ApprenticeNBC KENYA MOORE ROCKS! WATCH HER WORK HER STUFF!!!&#x27;&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551940849832300544" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551940849832300544" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  21:18</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ cav1301: @ realDonaldTrump Kenya Moore is an ass!! Hope she is fired FIRST!!!&#x27;&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551940882468179969" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551940882468179969" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B6B6B" data-theme="general" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; But we&#x27;re wondering who is this season&#x27;s @ GaryBussey&#x27;&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551942258040532993" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551942258040532993" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  21:25</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ Mari907: @ realDonaldTrump &amp; @ IvankaTrump back on my TV! I&#x27;m a happy gal &#x27;&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551942425472950272" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551942425472950272" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  21:25</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ Terramarkov16: @ Terramarkov16 @ realDonaldTrump: I think the ladies team will fire the blonde who dissed her team. Respect. # Apprentice&#x27;&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551942512827695105" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551942512827695105" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  21:27</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ michaelsdevine: Can&#x27;t wait to see what team lost so the gloves can come off! # CelebApprentice @ ApprenticeNBC @ realDonaldTrump&#x27;&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #4A5C3A">Military &amp; Veterans</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551942941292642304" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551942941292642304" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Buckle up! @ realDonaldTrump # CelebApprentice&#x27;&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551943494290669568" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551943494290669568" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  21:29</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ FTESTERNBTLSFAN: @ realDonaldTrump wonder who gets &#x27;FIRED&#x27; hmmm&#x27;&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551943531439587328" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551943531439587328" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  21:29</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ Jwundy: The iconic &#x27;You&#x27;re fired&#x27; is coming @ realDonaldTrump can&#x27;t wait.&#x27;&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Jan 04, 2015  21:30</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ GodIgetitnow: @ realDonaldTrump it will not be pretty (Keisha YOUR FIRED) # CelebApprentice&#x27;&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551943739917471746" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551943739917471746" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  21:30</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27;@DerrickBolenVA: @ realDonaldTrump has built up a great show # CelebApprentice&#x27;&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551943794380525568" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551943794380525568" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  21:30</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ eyetweethere: @ realDonaldTrump best part of the show&#x27;&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551943823723872256" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551943823723872256" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  21:30</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ MNBosstom: @ DonaldJTrumpJr @ realDonaldTrump I really needed to watch the Apprentice tonight!! Great show!! Motivates me!! # CelebApprentice&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551943905944821760" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551943905944821760" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  21:31</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27;@AnthonyJamesTV: @ GeraldoRivera and @ kevinjonas killed it! @ ApprenticeNBC @ realDonaldTrump @ nbc # CelebApprentice&#x27;&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551943943118917632" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551943943118917632" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  21:31</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27;@ArizonaNFLFan: . @ realDonaldTrump I love celebrity apprentice. The storylines are much better than NFL playoff football.&#x27;&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #4A5C3A">Military &amp; Veterans</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551943989814104065" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551943989814104065" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  21:31</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ miasmiiles: @ realDonaldTrump # trumpforpresident2016&#x27;&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Jan 04, 2015  21:31</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ SarahSS555: @ realDonaldTrump is my idol... # CelebApprentice&#x27; Thanks.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551944087809847296" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551944087809847296" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5E7A4C" data-theme="lifestyle" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  21:32</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ The_Paul08: There&#x27;s nothing more relaxing than a Trump Tower suite!! @ TrumpChicago @ TrumpCollection # CelebApprentice @ realDonaldTrump&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Jan 04, 2015  21:32</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ MarshaABrady: @ realDonaldTrump @ TheApprentice9 I hope it&#x27;s Kate</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551944333776392192" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551944333776392192" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  21:33</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ keithwmcandrew: Who will @ realDonaldTrump fire?!? Will there be a # catfight in the boardroom?!? @ ApprenticeNBC # CelebrityApprentice&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551944444204032000" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551944444204032000" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  21:33</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ NicoleAMarin: Mondays are about to become my favourite night of the week! # CelebrityApprentice @ realDonaldTrump @ IvankaTrump&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551944591495426049" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551944591495426049" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  21:40</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ UglyWewe: Love @ realDonaldTrump asking @ BrandiGlanville for the truth! He knows he&#x27;ll get it!&#x27;&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551946348002836480" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551946348002836480" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5E7A4C" data-theme="lifestyle" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  21:40</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ luvsleopard2: @ billybush @ realDonaldTrump the music always gives it such a dramatic effect&#x27;&quot;</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551946393364230144" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551946393364230144" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  21:49</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ AlexPerrry: First time watching Celebrity Apprentice and I&#x27;m really enjoying it! @ realDonaldTrump&#x27;&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551948599408754688" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551948599408754688" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  21:49</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ NicoleAMarin: You&#x27;re Fired! It&#x27;s music to my ears when it comes from @ realDonaldTrump mouth! Why a commercial?!? # CelebrityApprentice&#x27;&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551948646422695936" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551948646422695936" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  21:50</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ irwin171: # CelebApprentice just turned me into a @ kevinjonas fan. Love the new season!! @ realDonaldTrump&#x27;&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551948859963097090" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551948859963097090" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  21:50</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ bethdelany: @ realDonaldTrump Jamie brought in no money? her pie recipe brought in $25K # CelebrityApprentice&#x27;&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551948906297561088" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551948906297561088" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B6B6B" data-theme="general" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  22:05</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Hope you liked it. Tune in tomorrow night at 8:00 and 9:00 for two episodes and two boardrooms! Will be a great evening of television!&quot;</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551952548253696000" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551952548253696000" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #4A5C3A" data-theme="military" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  22:08</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ virgiegurl: @ ApprenticeNBC @ realDonaldTrump AWESOME TEAMS TONIGHT. ..!!! PRICELESS&#x27;&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551953337529430017" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551953337529430017" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  22:09</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ RockyRoad_: Nothing like hearing @ realDonaldTrump say &#x27;YOU&#x27;RE FIRED&#x27; twice in one night! Tomorrow Night 8/7 CST! # CelebApprentice&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551953639074721792" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551953639074721792" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  22:09</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ loribuckmajor: @ realDonaldTrump @ BrandiGlanville is as real as they come. Love her # CelebApprentice&#x27;&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551953704241618944" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551953704241618944" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  22:10</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ ASEDawg89: @ realDonaldTrump so many women to fire. Gonna be a cat fight&#x27;&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551953780225617922" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551953780225617922" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  22:10</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ CrueBabe: @ realDonaldTrump I loved it. # CelebApprentice&#x27;&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551953828439130112" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551953828439130112" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  22:10</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27;@TravyJ1: I wonder how it would be growing up with @ realDonaldTrump as a father&#x27;&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551953907703103490" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551953907703103490" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  22:10</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ sweetiee1s: @ sweetiee1s: @ ACTUALLYDOMINIC @ realDonaldTrump @ peachespulliam I agree. Kate needed the boot. Her time will come&#x27;&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551953971976634368" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551953971976634368" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  22:11</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ iiarwatch: @ realDonaldTrump You fired the right woman tonight. Kenya &amp; Brandi each must go. The lowest of the low.&#x27;&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551954034958282752" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551954034958282752" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  22:17</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;This show was taped just before the terrible Bill Cosby revelations came to light.She still should have asked him for money-goes to charity.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551955535474728960" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551955535474728960" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  22:28</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ rachelredl: Ahhhhhh really would do anything to be on The Apprentice @ realDonaldTrump&#x27;&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #4B6A88">COVID / Health</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551958386989105152" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551958386989105152" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  22:28</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27;@RickyV_ADW: Gotta say I have @ kevinjonas winning it all @ realDonaldTrump social media</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551958464210407424" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551958464210407424" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  22:30</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ ameliasg: @ ameliasg @ piersmorgan @ ApprenticeNBC @ IvankaTrump does anyone else think some faces look like Picasso sculptures?&#x27;&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551958909993242625" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551958909993242625" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  22:33</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ JulieMyra: @ BrandiGlanville @ realDonaldTrump you go. Love your spirit. F the haters&#x27;&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551959606931755008" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551959606931755008" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  22:33</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ axpeters17: @ kevinjonas is the one to beat on @ ApprenticeNBC @ realDonaldTrump # CelebApprentice&#x27;&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551959638812655616" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551959638812655616" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  22:34</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27;@missklamert:I HATE @ realDonaldTrump ! But I have to watch this season of # TheApprentice because it has such an awesome cast. # TeamKenya !&#x27;&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551959952253018112" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551959952253018112" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  22:34</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ CandidlyNic: @ BrandiGlanville You were awesome! Love your loyalty to team members like Keisha. &lt;3 You!! @ KathySimovski @ realDonaldTrump&#x27;&quot;</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551960025745600512" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551960025745600512" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  22:35</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ bigdogg1974: @ realDonaldTrump @ Kateplusmy8 Kate looked great and did an amazing job</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551960139977486337" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551960139977486337" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B6B6B" data-theme="general" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  22:36</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ CeeCee928: @ MsVivicaFox PLS NOT @ BrandiGlanville OR @ KenyaMoore JUST BCUZ U R DRAMA DOESNT MEAN U SHOULD hEARN THE TITLE OR PRAISE&#x27;&quot;</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551960279521984513" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551960279521984513" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  22:36</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ ACLrecoveryCLUB: @ realDonaldTrump I know you went back and forth w/ Cuban - I&#x27;m convinced @ ApprenticeNBC is the best show on tv!&#x27;&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551960407540506624" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551960407540506624" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  22:36</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ Kbrozz26: @ realDonaldTrump I don&#x27;t watch a lot of T.V but couldn&#x27;t wait for Celebrity Apprentice. It was great!!&#x27;&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551960454982283264" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551960454982283264" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  22:36</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ BraunMatt: Really enjoyed # CelebApprentice tonight. Looking forward to a couple new episodes tomorrow night! @ realDonaldTrump&#x27;&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551960491820871681" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551960491820871681" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  22:37</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ summer0001: Why is @ realDonaldTrump so amazing? Love watching # CelebApprentice&#x27;&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551960683366326272" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551960683366326272" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  22:38</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ SparkleAWin: DonaldTrump Alot of good looking guys but what&#x27;s important is R they # CelebApprentice material Can&#x27;t wait 2 C them in action&#x27;&quot;</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551960860072374272" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551960860072374272" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  22:38</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ DanaDelikat: @ ApprenticeNBC. Surprised how accurate and likable the Jonas brother is pointing out Heraldo&#x27;s # bighead # big # ego poster&#x27;&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551961033498456064" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551961033498456064" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  22:39</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ AnnieDrews: So glad # CelebApprentice is back! Looks like it will be a fantastic year! Thanks for a great show. Got out of hosp in time!&#x27;&quot;</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551961168739577856" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551961168739577856" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  22:39</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27;@ShortCakesSheep: I am rooting for @ RealGilbert @ kevinjonas but if I was on the # Apprentice I would call my friend @ limbaugh to help&#x27;&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551961274628980736" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551961274628980736" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B6B6B" data-theme="general" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  22:40</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ wooten_smith: @RickyV_ADW @ kevinjonas I agree kevin seems to have what it takes and he seems very classy. Wasnt a fan b4 but am now.&#x27;&quot;</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551961488123236353" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551961488123236353" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  22:41</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ Shannonfamini: @ realDonaldTrump can&#x27;t wait for tomorrow&#x27;s episodes! # CelebApprentice # TRUMP&#x27;&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551961694818566145" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551961694818566145" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  22:42</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ RRodriguez62: @ realDonaldTrump First time I watched the start of the season. Enjoyed the show</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551961819221618688" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551961819221618688" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  22:42</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27;@tmh813: @ realDonaldTrump prove that you actually control this account</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551961929380790272" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551961929380790272" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  22:42</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ KennyKing4: @ JustinTGee # CelebApprentice is one of my fav shows!!! Wanna live tweet tmrw night? # datenight @ realDonaldTrump @ IvankaTrump&#x27;&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551961995889876993" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551961995889876993" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B6B6B" data-theme="general" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  22:45</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;I will be LIVE tweeting tomorrow (MONDAY) nights TWO shows starting at 8:00 P.M. They are both great.&quot;</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551962720120360960" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551962720120360960" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  22:46</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ sixtoluis57: @ ameliasg @ piersmorgan @ ApprenticeNBC @ IvankaTrump No comment</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551962943634812928" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551962943634812928" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  22:46</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27;@Aschultz2014: @ realDonaldTrump Best @ ApprenticeNBC cast ever!! Love @ IanZiering and so glad @ Kateplusmy8 wasn&#x27;t fired! # notlazy&#x27;&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551963012631126018" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551963012631126018" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  22:48</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ erik. My newsfeed is nothing but DonaldTrump n @ RealGilbert # CelebrityApprentice! But that&#x27;s alright with me cuz I love them. Great minds.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551963491490623488" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551963491490623488" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  23:03</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ JordonBruno: I really love @ realDonaldTrump&#x27;&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_551967238887317504" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/551967238887317504" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2015  23:03</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ Linsinn: @ realDonaldTrump Yes! Will be talking about many things</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_552064188110348288" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/552064188110348288" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5E7A4C" data-theme="lifestyle" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 05, 2015  06:28</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ tokindaddy: @ realDonaldTrump your the man</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_552079133669621760" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/552079133669621760" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B6B6B" data-theme="general" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 05, 2015  07:11</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ nelly_quarez: . @ realDonaldTrump # CelebApprentice was awesome yesterday. Can&#x27;t wait to see a new episode tonight! @ kevinjonas we are here&quot;</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_552090072632524800" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/552090072632524800" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #C9A961" data-theme="nicknames_good" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 05, 2015  09:02</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;# CelebApprentice We had lots of fun last night with the live tweeting so I will do it again tonight from 8-10pm.&quot;</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_552118027593195522" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/552118027593195522" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B6B6B" data-theme="general" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 05, 2015  09:33</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Wow</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_552125670982447104" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/552125670982447104" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 05, 2015  13:20</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;. @ peachespulliam at @ TrumpTowerNY this afternoon- a wonderful woman. It was an honor to donate $25K to her charity. http://bit.ly/1wQlCvq&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_552182761281564672" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/552182761281564672" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 05, 2015  15:09</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Via @ peoplemag by @ amandamichl: ‚Äú @ IvankaTrump: @Joan_RiversWas &#x27;Very Warm&#x27; During Appearance on @ ApprenticeNBC‚Äù http://www.people.com/article/joan-rivers-celebrity-apprentice-donald-ivanka-trump ‚Ä¶&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_552210253841174530" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/552210253841174530" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B6B6B" data-theme="general" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 05, 2015  15:24</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Via @ latimes‚Äô @LATshowtracker:‚ÄúMonday&#x27;s TV Highlights:@ApprenticeNBCon @ nbc‚Äùhttp://www.latimes.com/entertainment/tv/showtracker/la-et-st-mondays-tv-highlights-the-celebrity-apprentice-on-nbc-20150102-story.html ‚Ä¶&quot;</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_552214195912343553" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/552214195912343553" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 05, 2015  15:42</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;You can watch all the highlights of last night‚Äôs record 14th season premiere of @ ApprenticeNBChttp://www.nbc.com/the-celebrity-apprentice ‚Ä¶&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_552218576242098176" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/552218576242098176" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B6B6B" data-theme="general" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 05, 2015  19:08</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ mbgrimm02: @ BrandiGlanville @ ApprenticeNBC I really wish Kate would just shut it and let people talk and quit her side comments!!!&#x27;&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_552270497992679424" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/552270497992679424" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 05, 2015  19:09</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ erin_thereseV: @ realDonaldTrump is Kate her own charity? Jan 05, 2015  19:12</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27;@lghaas30: @ realDonaldTrump Glad to see George again on # CelebApprentice &#x27;&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_552271434748530688" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/552271434748530688" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 05, 2015  19:12</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ MickeyMiller33: Watching # CelebApprentice @ realDonaldTrump it&#x27;s on I am rooting for # TeamBrandi and my 15 year old is rooting # TeamKevin&#x27;&quot;</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_552271482832031744" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/552271482832031744" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 05, 2015  19:12</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ WondHerful: @ the_ValleyGirl YES!!!!!!!! @ ApprenticeNBC # CelebApprentice @ DonaldJTrumpJr @ realDonaldTrump # MostIntelligentRealityShow&#x27;&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_552271527119695872" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/552271527119695872" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article></div><script src="../assets/filter.js"></script>
